title: UltraShop
body:
🛒 **Shop Mod - Advanced Store System** 🛒

🛍️ This mod adds a store system with various features, enabling a dynamic and varied economy within the game. It also tracks all player transactions and keeps a purchase history for each product, ensuring better tracking and management.

## ✨ **Types of Stores:** ✅
- 🏪 **Permanent** – A classic store with items always available for purchase.
- 📅 **Weekly** – Open only on specific days of the week. Don’t miss out before it closes!
- 🔄 **Dynamic** – Items constantly rotate, offering new opportunities for buying and selling.
- 📅🔄 **DynamicWeekly** – A combination of both: dynamic item rotation within a store open only on specific days.
- 📆 **Calendar** – A store based on a pre-defined calendar with rotating offers.
- 📆🔄 **DynamicCalendar** – Similar to **Dynamic**, but only active within a specific time period determined by the calendar.

## 📂 **Store Categories & Nested Stores:** ✅
- ➗ Stores can contain other stores, allowing you to create categories and subcategories for better organization.
- 🔗 Players can navigate through different sections of the store, making it easier to find specific items.
- 📌 Perfect for large-scale economies with multiple types of items!

## 📜 **Transaction Log:** ❌
- 🔍 Tracks all purchases and sales made by players.
- ➗ Detailed history of each product purchased.
- 📊 Economic monitoring for adjustments and balancing.

## 💸 **Discount System:** ✅
- 🔥 Apply discounts to specific stores or selected products.
- ⏳ Set time-limited offers to encourage purchases.
- 🎯 Customize discounts for certain players or special events.

## 🗝️ **Purchase Restrictions and Limitations:** ✅
- 🚫 **Purchase Permissions:** Configure which products require specific permissions to purchase and which are restricted based on player permissions.
- ⏳ **Purchase Limits:** Define if a product can only be bought once per player or if it has a cooldown (e.g., 1 purchase every 24 hours).
- 🎟️ **Exclusivity:** Some products may only be available to certain groups of players with special permissions.

💰 **Economy Support:** [Impactor](<https://modrinth.com/mod/impactor>), [BlanketEconomy](https://modrinth.com/mod/blanketeconomy), [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/), [CobbleDollars](<https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbledollars>), PebbleEconomy

💰 Manage your economy, track your purchase history, set strategic restrictions, and take advantage of discounts at the right time! 🎉

[Join our community on Discord](https://discord.gg/ZK2g6uw7SD)  
[Wiki](https://zonary123-dev.gitbook.io/zonary123-dev-docs/mods/free-mods/cobbleshop)
